category.scope_note: Grid-tied solar PV inverter comparison for Pakistan. Hybrid storage inverter functions are excluded unless required by the project grid-connection review.

title.en: China-to-Pakistan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入巴基斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入巴基斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Pakistan PSQCA standards and IEC 62109 evidence, NEPRA / DISCO grid-connection and net-metering routes, 50 Hz settings, EMC evidence, and China GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 baseline evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与巴基斯坦 PSQCA 标准及 IEC 62109 证据、NEPRA / DISCO 并网和净计量路径、50 Hz 设置、EMC 证据及中国 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 基线证据差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與巴基斯坦 PSQCA 標準及 IEC 62109 證據、NEPRA / DISCO 併網和淨計量路徑、50 Hz 設定、EMC 證據及中國 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 基線證據差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, PSQCA mandatory-product scope determination, IEC adoption confirmation, NEPRA registration or prosumer approval, DISCO grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, EPCs, and project owners should verify current Pakistan PSQCA, NEPRA, DISCO, grid-code, net-metering, EMC, labeling, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、PSQCA 强制产品范围裁定、IEC 采纳确认、NEPRA 注册或产消者批准、DISCO 并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、EPC 和项目业主在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴基斯坦 PSQCA、NEPRA、DISCO、并网规范、净计量、EMC、标签、海关及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、PSQCA 強制產品範圍裁定、IEC 採納確認、NEPRA 註冊或產消者批准、DISCO 併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、EPC 和項目業主在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴基斯坦 PSQCA、NEPRA、DISCO、併網規範、淨計量、EMC、標籤、海關及專案要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Pakistan, do not assume a China GB/T report alone is enough. The practical file should confirm PSQCA scope and any Pakistan Standard or IEC 62109 adoption route, prepare IEC 62109 safety evidence, support the customer's current NEPRA / DISCO grid-connection or prosumer / net-metering route, validate 50 Hz and Pakistan protection settings, include EMC evidence, and map China GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 evidence only as a technical baseline.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口巴基斯坦时，不应假设中国 GB/T 报告本身已经足够。实际资料包应确认 PSQCA 适用范围以及任何巴基斯坦标准或 IEC 62109 采纳路径，准备 IEC 62109 安全证据，支持客户当前 NEPRA / DISCO 并网或产消者/净计量路径，验证 50 Hz 及巴基斯坦保护参数，包含 EMC 证据，并仅将 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 作为技术基线对照。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口巴基斯坦時，不應假設中國 GB/T 報告本身已經足夠。實際資料包應確認 PSQCA 適用範圍以及任何巴基斯坦標準或 IEC 62109 採納路徑，準備 IEC 62109 安全證據，支持客戶當前 NEPRA / DISCO 併網或產消者／淨計量路徑，驗證 50 Hz 及巴基斯坦保護參數，包含 EMC 證據，並僅將 GB/T 37408 / GB/T 19964 作為技術基線對照。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Pakistan regulator, PSQCA, NEPRA, DISCO, grid operator, customs, standards body, IEC, SAMR/SAC, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
